# butakov.dev — Alexander Butakov, IT Consultant

## Services
- Complex web services and startups (Django 5, Next.js 15)
- E-commerce on 1C-Bitrix with 1C:UT integration
- Digital marketing & Performance (Yandex Direct)
- Corporate WordPress sites
- Legacy support (Bitrix, WordPress)
- AI consulting — LLM and neural network integration

## Engineering Cases
- Building an online store on WordPress with Claude Code: a budget case with 1C ERP integration ($0 in licenses, live in weeks): https://butakov.dev/journal/wordpress-claude-code-1c
- Multi-Region Architecture for a Bitrix E-commerce Store: 27 Cities on Subdomains (27 cities, 0 duplicates): https://butakov.dev/journal/bitrix-multiregion-subdomains
- Cache Warmup Architecture for a 200k SKU Catalog (Server response 190ms): https://butakov.dev/journal/bitrix-cache-warmup
- High-Load E-commerce Optimization: DB Locks, CRM Crashes and AI Bot Attacks (+40% server response speed): https://butakov.dev/journal/bitrix-highload-ecommerce
- Redis Optimization for Bitrix: Background Tag Cleanup Without Session Loss (97% RAM freed): https://butakov.dev/journal/redis-optimization
- WordPress Recovery After Fatal Error During PHP 8.3 Migration (Uptime 99.99%): https://butakov.dev/journal/wordpress-php83-migration
- SPA Deployment: Fixing Build Conflicts and Infinite Redirect Loops (+14% form conversion): https://butakov.dev/journal/spa-deployment-fix
- Legacy Bitrix Adaptation for PHP 8: Fixing Core Errors and Admin Panel (100% admin panel stability): https://butakov.dev/journal/bitrix-php8-legacy
